youtube_short.title: The /ship Pipeline That Fixes Launch-Day Chaos
youtube_short.description: A demo-first breakdown of the /ship launch pipeline, from intake and strategy to content, launch, and measurement, plus the $497 course CTA.

tweets.text: Most solo founders do not have a product problem. They have a launch coordination problem.
Intake lives in one tab, strategy in another, content in another, and launch still depends on a human carrying context across the whole thing.
That is what /ship is built to fix. One command kicks off intake, validation, strategy, content, launch, and measurement as a coordinated system.
The new OSS demo-first content bundle breaks it into 3 reels: the problem, the fix, and the architecture. DM SHIP for the repo. Reply COURSE for the $497 training.

cta.reason_for_now: to get the operating model before your next launch turns back into manual GTM chaos

linkedin_post.text:
Most product teams do not stall because they cannot build. They stall because launch execution is fragmented. Intake, positioning, content, launch, and follow-through all sit in separate tools and separate mental models.

The /ship demo-first reel set shows the opposite approach: one intake, named agents, explicit handoffs, stage gates, and a full path from strategy to launch.

That is also the core promise behind the $497 /ship course. It is not another prompt pack. It is an operating model for turning product readiness into launch readiness.

cta.reason_for_now: because the next launch usually slips on coordination, not on code

email.preview_text: A demo-first breakdown of how /ship turns disconnected launch tasks into one coordinated system.
email.body_html:
Your launch is probably blocked by coordination, not code

Most builders think they need better prompts. Usually, they need better handoffs.

/ship starts with intake, validates the work, builds strategy, creates launch assets, pushes execution forward, and measures what happened after launch.

If you want the free install guide, reply with SHIP. If you want the full training, reply with COURSE and I will send the $497 course link.
